perfunctory.englishA: His apology sounded perfunctory, as though rehearsed.
perfunctory.englishB: Indeed, sincerity was nowhere to be found.
perfunctory.turkishA: Onun özrü yüzeysel geldi, sanki prova edilmiş gibiydi.

perfunctory.englishA: Rarely have I witnessed such a perfunctory performance.
perfunctory.englishB: Had he cared, the outcome would have been strikingly different.
perfunctory.turkishA: Böylesine yüzeysel bir performansa nadiren tanık oldum.

perfunctory.englishA: She greeted us with a perfunctory smile, barely concealing her disdain.
perfunctory.englishB: So thin a veil, it was almost transparent.
perfunctory.turkishA: Bizi yüzeysel bir gülümsemeyle selamladı, küçümsemesini zor gizliyordu.
perfunctory.turkishB: Öyle ince bir perdeydi ki, neredeyse şeffaftı.

perfunctory.englishA: Were his efforts not perfunctory, progress might have been tangible.
perfunctory.turkishA: Çabaları yüzeysel olmasaydı, ilerleme somut olabilirdi.
perfunctory.turkishB: Ama ne yazık ki, sıradanlık galip geldi.

perfunctory.englishA: With perfunctory nods, the committee dismissed the proposal.
perfunctory.turkishA: Komite yüzeysel baş sallamalarla öneriyi reddetti.
perfunctory.turkishB: Ne tartışma vardı ne de gerçek bir ilgilenme.

perfunctory.englishA: Hardly had he finished his perfunctory inspection when flaws emerged.
perfunctory.englishB: A thorough eye would have caught them instantly.
perfunctory.turkishA: Yüzeysel incelemesini bitirir bitirmez kusurlar ortaya çıktı.
perfunctory.turkishB: Dikkatli bir göz onları anında yakalardı.

perfunctory.englishA: Her perfunctory compliments betrayed a lack of genuine admiration.
perfunctory.englishB: Flattery, when hollow, is worse than silence.
perfunctory.turkishA: Onun yüzeysel iltifatları gerçek hayranlığın eksikliğini gösteriyordu.

perfunctory.englishA: Not until his perfunctory report was scrutinized did the truth surface.
perfunctory.englishB: And what a stark truth it was.
perfunctory.turkishA: Onun yüzeysel raporu incelenene kadar gerçek ortaya çıkmadı.
perfunctory.turkishB: Ve bu ne kadar çarpıcı bir gerçekti.

perfunctory.englishA: Had the teacher’s feedback been less perfunctory, the student might have thrived.
perfunctory.englishB: Encouragement, after all, is the seed of growth.
perfunctory.turkishA: Öğretmenin geri bildirimi daha az yüzeysel olsaydı, öğrenci gelişebilirdi.

perfunctory.englishA: Perfunctory gestures of kindness often mask indifference.
perfunctory.englishB: True compassion, however, cannot be feigned.
perfunctory.turkishA: Yüzeysel nezaket jestleri çoğu zaman ilgisizliği gizler.

meticulous.englishA: Her notes were meticulous, capturing every nuance.
meticulous.englishB: That precision made the analysis invaluable.
meticulous.turkishB: O hassasiyet analizi paha biçilmez kıldı.

meticulous.englishA: He arranged the tools in meticulous order.

meticulous.englishB: Without it, the truth would remain obscured.
meticulous.turkishA: Titiz araştırma gizli bağlantıları ortaya çıkardı.

meticulous.englishA: Her meticulous handwriting impressed the teacher.
meticulous.englishB: Clarity is a virtue in communication.
meticulous.turkishA: Onun titiz el yazısı öğretmeni etkiledi.

meticulous.englishA: Meticulous planning ensured the project’s success.
He followed the recipe with meticulous care.
Meticulous cleaning left the room spotless.
meticulous.englishB: Not a speck of dust remained.

meticulous.englishA: Her meticulous attention to detail won her praise.
meticulous.englishB: Excellence lies in the small things.
meticulous.turkishA: Onun ayrıntılara titiz dikkati övgü kazandırdı.

meticulous.englishA: Meticulous editing improved the manuscript greatly.
meticulous.englishB: Errors vanished under her careful eye.
meticulous.turkishA: Titiz düzenleme el yazmasını büyük ölçüde geliştirdi.

meticulous.englishA: He kept meticulous records of every transaction.
meticulous.turkishB: Bu özen işini güvence altına aldı.

diligent.englishA: She was diligent in her studies, never missing a detail.
His diligent efforts kept the project on track.
diligent.englishB: Without them, delays would have been inevitable.
diligent.turkishA: Onun gayretli çabaları projeyi rayında tuttu.

diligent.englishA: Diligent workers often achieve more than expected.
diligent.englishB: Their persistence is the key to progress.
diligent.turkishA: Gayretli çalışanlar genellikle beklenenden fazlasını başarır.

diligent.englishA: She kept diligent notes during the lecture.
diligent.englishB: Later, they proved invaluable for revision.
diligent.turkishB: Sonradan, tekrar için paha biçilmez oldu.

diligent.englishA: His diligent practice improved his skills rapidly.
diligent.turkishA: Onun gayretli çalışması becerilerini hızla geliştirdi.

diligent.englishA: Diligent research uncovered the missing evidence.
diligent.englishB: It changed the course of the investigation.
diligent.turkishA: Titiz araştırma kayıp kanıtı ortaya çıkardı.

diligent.englishA: She was diligent in her duties, earning respect.
diligent.englishB: Responsibility and effort never go unnoticed.
diligent.turkishB: Sorumluluk ve çaba asla gözden kaçmaz.

diligent.englishA: His diligent preparation made the presentation flawless.
diligent.turkishA: Onun gayretli hazırlığı sunumu kusursuz yaptı.

diligent.englishA: Diligent attention to detail prevented mistakes.

resilient.englishA: She remained resilient after the setback.
resilient.englishB: Her strength inspired everyone around her.

resilient.englishA: Resilient communities rebuild faster after disasters.
resilient.englishB: Unity is the foundation of recovery.
resilient.turkishA: Dirençli topluluklar felaketlerden sonra daha hızlı yeniden inşa eder.

resilient.englishA: He showed resilient determination in the competition.

resilient.turkishA: Dirençli bitkiler sert iklimlerde hayatta kalır.

resilient.englishA: Resilient athletes recover quickly from injuries.
He remained resilient in the face of failure.
Resilient leaders guide their teams through crises.
She was resilient in pursuing her dreams.
Resilient minds adapt to change easily.
resilient.turkishA: Dirençli zihinler değişime kolayca uyum sağlar.

innovative.englishA: Her innovative idea transformed the company’s strategy.
innovative.turkishA: Onun yenilikçi fikri şirketin stratejisini dönüştürdü.
innovative.turkishB: Yaratıcılık çoğu zaman yeni fırsatlar doğurur.

innovative.englishB: Originality is the heart of progress.
innovative.turkishA: Yenilikçi tasarımlar dünya çapında dikkat çeker.

innovative.englishA: He proposed an innovative solution to the problem.
innovative.englishB: It saved both time and resources.
innovative.turkishB: Hem zaman hem kaynak tasarrufu sağladı.

innovative.turkishA: Yenilikçi düşünenler geleneksel yöntemlere meydan okur.

innovative.englishA: Her innovative teaching style engaged the students.
innovative.englishB: Learning became both fun and effective.
innovative.turkishA: Onun yenilikçi öğretim tarzı öğrencileri etkiledi.
innovative.turkishB: Öğrenme hem eğlenceli hem de verimli hale geldi.

innovative.englishA: Innovative technology changed the way we communicate.
innovative.englishB: Distance no longer feels like a barrier.
innovative.turkishB: Mesafe artık bir engel gibi hissettirmiyor.

innovative.englishA: He admired her innovative approach to design.
innovative.turkishA: Onun tasarıma yenilikçi yaklaşımına hayran kaldı.
innovative.turkishB: Hem güzellik hem işlevsellik bir aradaydı.

innovative.englishA: Innovative leaders inspire their teams to excel.
innovative.turkishA: Yenilikçi liderler ekiplerini mükemmelliğe ilham eder.

innovative.englishA: Her innovative project won the competition.
Innovative solutions often emerge from collaboration.
innovative.turkishA: Yenilikçi çözümler çoğu zaman işbirliğinden doğar.

eloquent.englishA: Her eloquent speech captivated the audience.
eloquent.englishB: Every word carried weight and grace.
eloquent.turkishB: Her kelime ağırlık ve zarafet taşıyordu.

eloquent.englishA: He delivered an eloquent argument in court.
eloquent.englishB: The jury listened with full attention.

eloquent.englishA: Her eloquent writing conveyed deep emotions.
eloquent.turkishA: Onun etkileyici yazısı derin duyguları aktardı.

eloquent.englishB: Words become a source of strength.
eloquent.turkishA: Etkileyici bir lider güven ilham eder.

eloquent.englishA: His eloquent explanation clarified the complex topic.
eloquent.turkishA: Onun etkileyici açıklaması karmaşık konuyu netleştirdi.

eloquent.englishA: She gave an eloquent toast at the wedding.

eloquent.turkishA: Onun etkileyici mektubu minnettarlığı ifade etti.

eloquent.englishA: An eloquent storyteller brings tales to life.
eloquent.turkishA: Etkileyici bir hikâye anlatıcı öyküleri canlandırır.

eloquent.englishA: He gave an eloquent farewell speech.

astute.englishA: Her astute observation revealed the hidden flaw.
astute.englishB: It saved the team from failure.
astute.turkishA: Onun keskin gözlemi gizli kusuru ortaya çıkardı.

astute.englishA: He made an astute investment decision.
Her astute analysis clarified the situation.
An astute negotiator secures fair deals.
astute.turkishA: Keskin bir müzakereci adil anlaşmalar sağlar.

astute.englishA: His astute remark changed the discussion.
She gave an astute critique of the proposal.
His astute judgment guided the team.
astute.turkishA: Onun keskin yargısı ekibe rehberlik etti.

astute.englishA: Her astute question revealed the truth.
astute.turkishA: Onun keskin sorusu gerçeği ortaya çıkardı.

astute.englishA: Astute analysis often leads to innovation.
astute.turkishA: Keskin analiz çoğu zaman yeniliğe yol açar.
